caption:
@carrefouruae celebrates Philippines Independence Day with great discounts 🤩🇵🇭

This is the best time to shop for our Filipino staples, well-loved snacks, and condiments. They have a wide range of Filipino brands and other authentic Asian products!

You can avail the special offers at Carrefour hypermarkets and online until the 13th of June.

#CarrefourUAE #philippinesindependenceday #Dubai #UAE
